caption: Welcome to Tetris! Here's a quick demo of the game.
Let's start a new game by clicking the Start Game button.
Great! The game has begun. The first piece appears at the top of the board.
We move the piece to the left using the left arrow key three times.
The piece moves horizontally across the board.
Now we rotate the piece using the Space bar to change its orientation.
We move it right to position it where we want it.
The piece continues falling down automatically toward the bottom.
We speed up the descent using the down arrow key to drop it faster.
The piece lands and places itself on the board. A new piece spawns automatically.
We move this new piece to the right side of the board.
We rotate it a couple times to find the best fit.
As we continue playing, pieces stack up. Watch the score increase when we complete lines!
We continue dropping pieces rapidly to fill rows and clear them for points.
Complete rows are cleared automatically and your score increases. The level rises as you clear more lines. Try to keep playing as long as possible!
